200.description: The connected account was retrieved successfully.

id.description: The unique identifier of the connected account.

user_id.description: The [User](/reference/authkit/user) identifier associated with this connection.

organization_id.description: The [Organization](/reference/organization) identifier associated with this connection, or `null` if not scoped to an organization.

scopes.description: The OAuth scopes granted for this connection.

auth_method.description: The authentication method used for this connection (`oauth` or `api_key`). Defaults to `oauth` if absent.

api_key_last_4.description: The last four characters of the API key, or `null` for OAuth connections.

state.description:
The state of the connected account:
- `connected`: The connection is active and tokens are valid.
- `needs_reauthorization`: The user needs to reauthorize the connection, typically because required scopes have changed.
- `disconnected`: The connection has been disconnected.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the connection was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the connection was last updated.

401.description: The request is missing a valid API key.

404.description: The user, organization, or connected account was not found.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
